content.subject: Re: Unable to configure SMTP relay for my domain

body.text:
Hi Jane,

Great to hear that you've added your IP range to the whitelist!

IP whitelist propagation typically takes just around 15 minutes to complete. Please wait for about 15 minutes and then try your SMTP relay connection again.

If you continue to experience authentication errors after that time, please let us know and we can investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team
body.html:
Hi Jane,

Great to hear that you've added your IP range to the whitelist!

IP whitelist propagation typically takes just around 15 minutes to complete. Please wait for about 15 minutes and then try your SMTP relay connection again.

If you continue to experience authentication errors after that time, please let us know and we can investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team

expected_params.name: 5G Latency Optimization - Gaming Zone
expected_params.description: Optimize 5G network parameters to reduce round-trip latency for Cloud Gaming scenarios in Eastern Tech Park. The campaign targets gaming users experiencing high latency issues and aims to improve both average and 95th percentile latency metrics through parameter tuning.

predicted_params.definition: {"version": "1.0.0", "rules": [{"rule_id": " regole_pay_ip_whitelist_001", "description": "Payment API - IP Whitelist (10.0.0.0/8 and partner IPs)", "enabled": true, "match": {"methods": ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS", "HEAD"], "clients": [{"type": "ip_cidr", "value": "10.0.0.0/8"}]}, "actions": [{"type": "allow", "config": {"allowed_ips": ["10.0.0.0/8", "203.0.113.0/24", "198.51.100.0/24"]}]}, {"type": "deny", "config": {}}]}, {"rule_id": " regole_pay_jwt_scope_002", "description": "Payment API - JWT Scope Validation (payment:process)", "enabled": true, "match": {"methods": ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS", "HEAD"]}, "actions": [{"type": "validate_token", "config": {"required_scopes": ["payment:process"], "validate_expiration": true, "validate_signature": true}]}}, {"rule_id": " regole_prof_read_jwt_003", "description": "User Profile API - GET requires valid JWT only", "enabled": true, "match": {"methods": ["GET"], "clients": [{"type": "jwt", "scope": null}]}, "actions": [{"type": "validate_token", "config": {"required_scopes": [], "validate_expiration": true, "validate_signature": true}}, {"type": "allow", "config": {}}]}, {"rule_id": " regras_prof_write_admin_004", "description": "User Profile API - POST/PUT/DELETE limited to admin_portal_v1", "enabled": true, "match": {"methods": ["POST", "PUT", "DELETE"], "clients": [{"type": "client_id", "value": "admin_portal_v1"}]}, "actions": [{"type": "validate_role", "config": {"required_role": "role_admin"}}, {"type": "allow", "config": {}}]}]}

content.subject: [Incident INC-2024-0821-A1] Service Degradation - us-east-1 Region
content.body_text:
Dear Customer,

We are currently experiencing a service degradation affecting connectivity in the us-east-1 region (North Virginia / DC Metro). Our team is actively working to mitigate the issue.

Impact Details:
- Region: us-east-1 (POP-EQX-ASH1, POP-EQX-NYC1)
- Issue: Partial outage affecting Layer 2 Virtual Circuits and Cloud Exchange Direct Connect
- Root Cause: Upstream fiber utility cut

Actions Taken:
- We are proactively rerouting affected traffic through secondary gateways
- Engaging with upstream fiber provider for repair ETA

We will provide further updates as they become available. Thank you for your patience.

Regards,
TaaS Operations Team

risk_assessment.risk_description: Rerouting to secondary gateway may introduce additional latency but will restore connectivity for high-impact customer
risk_assessment.fallback_plan: Roll back to primary path if secondary path performance is unacceptable

expected_params.summary: Corrected affected region from APAC to us-east-1 based on scope analysis
expected_params.details: Initial incident creation indicated APAC region as affected. Scope analysis confirmed actual impact is in us-east-1 (North Virginia / DC Metro), affecting sites POP-EQX-ASH1 and POP-EQX-NYC1.

expected_params.title: 网络性能异常 - 设备信号严重恶化
expected_params.description: 检测到多个高严重性异常：设备70B3D57ED00ABCDE的RSSI从-95 dBm恶化到-128 dBm，设备0102030405060708的上行成功率从98%暴跌到45%。网络级11:30时段出现明显性能下降，成功率降至94.5%。

predicted_params.title: Critical: Severe Signal Degradation and Uplink Failure on Device 70B3D57ED00ABCDE
predicted_params.description: Device 70B3D57ED00ABCDE experienced severe RSSI degradation (-128 dBm vs baseline -95 dBm) and high uplink failure rate (45% vs 98% baseline) detected at 2023-10-28T10:30Z. Two high-severity anomalies detected requiring immediate investigation. Potential causes: device obstruction, radio interference, or RF environmental changes.

expected_params.name: Fix NY-BOS Congestion - Phase 1
expected_params.description: Reroute 20% of non-critical traffic from the congested primary link (CR-London-Primary-04 -> ES-Manchester-Agg-01) to the secondary link via CR-London-Secondary-02. This will alleviate congestion during peak hours (18:00-22:00), reduce latency from 45ms to baseline levels (~12ms), and mitigate SLA penalty risk for FinTech Global Ltd ($15,000 at risk).

business_case.justification: High SLA penalty risk of $45,000 total, with $15,000 immediately at risk for FinTech Global Ltd. Active incident inc_8821_net_slow is correlated with this congestion. Rerouting 20% non-critical traffic will reduce utilization from 94.2% to ~75%, bringing latency back within SLA thresholds.

Reroute 20% of non-critical traffic to secondary link to reduce congestion on primary interconnection between CoreRouter_NY_04 and CoreRouter_BOS_02. Addresses the $45k SLA penalty risk and improves latency for 15,420 affected subscribers including 12 VIP accounts.

components.description: 20% discount on monthly bill for 12 months when upgrading to Fiber 500 plan
Speed upgrade from Fiber 300 to Fiber 500 (1Gbps capable)
One-time goodwill credit of $50 for service interruptions experienced in the last 90 days

expected_params.notes_for_agent: This bundled offer addresses the customer's top 3 concerns: (1) Network performance - upgrade to Fiber 500 resolves speed issues, (2) Price sensitivity - 20% discount for 12 months beats competitor's $20 gap, (3) Service frustration - $50 goodwill credit acknowledges past service interruptions. Emphasize the price lock guarantee and technical improvement during the call. Note: A senior technician dispatch for line quality check should be scheduled BEFORE or IMMEDIATELY AFTER offer acceptance to ensure speed improvement is delivered.

components.description: 20% Monthly Discount on upgraded Fiber 500 plan for 12 months
$50 One-Time Goodwill Credit for Service Quality Issues
12-Month Contract Extension with Early Termination Fee Waiver

predicted_params.notes_for_agent: This bundled proposal addresses all three risk drivers: 1) tariff discount matches competitor pricing, 2) goodwill credit acknowledges service failures, 3) contract extension provides stability. Key talking points: 'We understand the speed issues and are dispatching a technician today. Additionally, we can match HyperLink's pricing with our 20% discount on the Fiber 500 upgrade, plus we're waiving early termination fees and providing a $50 credit for the service disruptions. This locks in better speeds at a lower cost than competitors for 12 months.' Emphasize the technician dispatch first, then present the offer.
